name: vms-prototype
description: Browser-based Video Management System prototype using WebCodecs + WebGPU

scripts.test: npm run test:bridge && npm run test:client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w bridge-server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/',d='client/public/';fs.readdirSync(p).filter(f=>f.startsWith('ort-wasm')&&f.endsWith('.wasm')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p+f,d+f));console.log('Copied ORT WASM files to client/public/')"
